notifications.fullmessage:
CS-419-Deep Learning 2K23-BSCS-13 'Sp26 DE -> Forums -> Announcements -> Lab Sessional Finalization - (DL - Section D & E) 
https://lms.nust.edu.pk/portal/mod/forum/discuss.php?d=41767#p52342
Lab Sessional Finalization - (DL - Section D & E)
by Areeba Rameen - Friday, 29 May 2026, 1:25 PM
---------------------------------------------------------------------
Dear Students,

Please note that the marks for all your labs have been uploaded on the
Qalam portal. Sessionals are now final. No more new submission is allowed
in terms of labs. If you have any queries regarding your lab marks, please
submit them through the form link provided below. The form will remain open
to resolve your issues UNTIL 2 JUNE:

SECTION D LINK:

https://forms.gle/skdUuiswjCmttfNZ9

SECTION E LINK:

https://forms.gle/iwwNN2KMz3tHYAzGA

Please note that no queries or issues will be entertained via email or
after the deadline. All concerns must be submitted strictly through the
given form before the closing date.

Regards,



---------------------------------------------------------------------
This is a copy of a message posted in CS-419-Deep Learning 2K23-BSCS-13 'Sp26 DE.

notifications.fullmessagehtml:
Lab Sessional Finalization - (DL - Section D & E)

Dear Students,

Please note that the marks for all your labs have been uploaded on the Qalam portal. Sessionals are now final. No more new submission is allowed in terms of labs. If you have any queries regarding your lab marks, please submit them through the form link provided below. The form will remain open to resolve your issues until 2 June:

Section D Link:

https://forms.gle/skdUuiswjCmttfNZ9

Section E Link:

https://forms.gle/iwwNN2KMz3tHYAzGA

Please note that no queries or issues will be entertained via email or after the deadline. All concerns must be submitted strictly through the given form before the closing date.

Regards,
Reply
by Areeba Rameen - Friday, 29 May 2026, 1:25 PM
